requirements.criterion: Application CQA and customer test boundary are defined
Vanadium industrial benchmark is retained or formally retired
Active-site concentration is separated from total metal
E/P/diene insertion competition is represented
Transfer and deactivation mechanisms are declared
MWD, CCD and sequence measurements are qualified
Retained unsaturation and diene topology are measured
Long-chain branching and gel/percolation risk are bounded
Polymer-solution phase stability is demonstrated
High-viscosity mixing and heat removal are qualified
Quench and deashing residuals meet criteria
Devolatilization uses a non-equilibrium basis
Recycle poison memory, guard bed and purge are closed
Mooney and rheology bridge to a fixed compound
Cure response uses a controlled formulation
Grade transition and off-spec accounting are validated
Part durability is connected to molecular architecture
Customer-line qualification has named evidence
Scale-up preserves mixing, heat and residence-time constraints
Package acceptance has named process, HSE and customer approvals
